strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across software, hardware, and infrastructure
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and tooling contributions at re:cinq (MCP code generators)
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative via GISCollective, an open-source AI-adjacent platform used by NGOs
concerns: No explicit evidence of cloud platform strategy leadership or AI product ownership at scale
Lack of documented Master's/PhD in AI-related field despite preference
Minimal mention of direct customer advisory or external AI technology evangelism
response.justification: The candidate has 15+ years of hands-on engineering experience with clear AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq and open-source AI-adjacent platform development via GISCollective, satisfying the core requirement of AI product fluency. However, there is no evidence of cloud product strategy leadership, customer advisory roles, or formal AI education — critical for a director-level AI strategy role. His entrepreneurial initiative and full-stack fluency are strong, but the absence of cloud platform strategy ownership and external influence reduces alignment with key responsibilities.
